name: apipass
description: Encrypted vault for API keys — web + signed macOS app. Part of C-LAB.

scripts.build:argon2: esbuild build/argon2-entry.mjs --bundle --format=iife --global-name=ApiPassArgon2 --minify --legal-comments=inline --banner:js="/* ApiPass: argon2id vendored from @noble/hashes (MIT). Regenerate: npm run build:argon2 */" --outfile=frontend/argon2.js
